op_000001.source_statement: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number (bc.ket n) = (n : ℂ) • bc.ket n
op_000001.formalized_statement: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number (bc.ket n) = (n : ℂ) • bc.ket n
op_000001.statement_formalization_notes: Used the existing `BosonCore.number` and `BosonCore.ket` field notation from Theory.lean.

op_000001.proof_sketch: Split on n. The zero case is `number_vacuum` plus `ket_zero`. The successor case follows directly from `a_ket_succ`, linearity of `aDagger`, and `aDagger_ket`.
op_000001.proof_text:
intro V _ _ bc n
cases n with
| zero =>
    rw [bc.ket_zero, bc.number_vacuum]
    simp
| succ n =>
    calc
      bc.number (bc.ket (n + 1))
          = bc.aDagger (bc.a (bc.ket (n + 1))) := rfl
      _ = bc.aDagger ((↑(n + 1) : ℂ) • bc.ket n) := by
        rw [bc.a_ket_succ]
      _ = (↑(n + 1) : ℂ) • bc.aDagger (bc.ket n) := by
        rw [map_smul]
      _ = (↑(n + 1) : ℂ) • bc.ket (n + 1) := by
        rw [bc.aDagger_ket]

op_000002.source_statement: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number * bc.aDagger ^ n - bc.aDagger ^ n * bc.number = (n : ℂ) • bc.aDagger ^ n
op_000002.formalized_statement: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number * bc.aDagger ^ n - bc.aDagger ^ n * bc.number = (n : ℂ) • bc.aDagger ^ n
op_000002.docstring_summary: The number operator commutator with the nth creation power is n times that power.
op_000002.statement_formalization_notes: Kept the repository's existing `bc.number`, `bc.aDagger`, power, and smul notation from Theory.lean.
